2148010.name: DAWN OF ARBA
2148010.description:
DAWN OF ARBA is an online multiplayer game where players will need to adapt to living in a new unfamiliar world in order to survive. Adventurers will need to gather resources and supplies and level up their characters to survive the dark secrets that lie within the world of ARBA.

Gameplay mechanics include:
  • Alchemy
  • Base Building
  • Crafting
  • Character Progression
  • Farming & Herbalism
  • PvP & PvE
  • Melee and Ranged Combat
  • and much more.. (secrets that should not be revealed)

You will need to strengthen your character as you perform various tasks to stay alive in a hostile environment. From Warriors and Archers to Blacksmiths and Farmers, level up your skills, unlock talents and shape the destiny of your character down the path you most desire. Build up your defenses and protect your loot from hostile enemies at all costs. Be warned however, as other players may not be the only cause for concern.

Venture beyond the safer biomes into treacherous poisonous swamps, unforgiving dunes or experience the freezing bite of the arctic and discover that although the world of ARBA is beautiful at first sight, its history harbors a hidden secret and a much deeper and dangerous truth.
2148010.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
